# Sentinel Intelligence — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> A sophisticated real-time tracking and intelligence platform inspired by Palantir's aesthetic, featuring live visualization of aircraft, maritime vessels, and satellites. The platform emphasizes dynamic data streams, closed airspace monitoring, blackout detection, and comprehensive flight trajectory analysis with a cinematic, high-tech interface design.

---

## Pages

### Home
https://sentinel-intelligence-433c365f.zappy5.app
Real-time AIS boat tracking and vessel monitoring with cinematic data visualization. Track aircraft, maritime vessels, and satellites with advanced intelligence streams.

### Platform
https://sentinel-intelligence-433c365f.zappy5.app/platform
Sophisticated vessel tracking live with dynamic data streams, closed airspace monitoring, and blackout detection. Experience Palantir-inspired visualization technology.

### Use Cases
https://sentinel-intelligence-433c365f.zappy5.app/use-cases
Discover how AIS boat tracking powers defense, logistics, and security operations. Explore real-world applications of live vessel tracking and airspace intelligence.

### Contact
https://sentinel-intelligence-433c365f.zappy5.app/contact
Get started with enterprise-grade AIS vessel tracking and real-time intelligence. Contact our team to schedule a personalized platform demonstration today.

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About Sentinel Intelligence
A sophisticated real-time tracking and intelligence platform inspired by Palantir's aesthetic, featuring live visualization of aircraft, maritime vessels, and satellites. The platform emphasizes dynamic data streams, closed airspace monitoring, blackout detection, and comprehensive flight trajectory analysis with a cinematic, high-tech interface design.

## Target Audience
- Aerospace Security Officials
- Satellite Communications Teams

## Industry
software/data visualization

---
